titleStmt.title: SII 27.108: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 108. (A.R. No. 282 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing in the temple of Bappaḷāpura-Gaṇapati.

This record renews a gift of lands and money income made formerly by Raṅgaṇṇa-seṭṭi for worship and offerings and feeding brāhmaṇas on certain occasions in the temples of Vināyaka, Chaṇḍēśvari and Nārāyaṇadēva and also for the persons responsible for the maintenance of the tank called Raṅgaṇṇana-keṟe by the seṭṭis and other chiefs of Ariyakēri who made over the same to Kannēśa-voḍeya who was appointed as a trustee for that purpose, when Chaṇḍarasavoḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of the king and mahā-pradhāna Perumāḷadēva-daṇṇāyaka. Another damaged record in Nāgarī characters appears to have been engraved below this at a much later date. Its purport is not clear.
The original record is dated Śaka 1355, Paridhāvi, Mārggaśira śu. 14, Saturday corresponding to 1432 A.D., December 6.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . trelō
kya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakava
ruṣa 1355 neya paridhāvi saṁvatsarada mārggaśira śu 14 śuralu śrīmanmahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijeyanagariya rājamaṁ
diradallirddu rājyavanu pratipālisuttirddalli śrīmanmahāpradhāna perumūḷedēva daṇā
yakaru śirapradhārikeya nāḷuvalli Ā rāyara daṇāyakara nirūpadiṁ caṁḍarasavo
ḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava Aḷuvakāladalu kaṁnēśa voḍeyarige mūṟukēriya voḷagaṇa
Ariya kēriya vobba seṭṭikā[ṟa Ai]vateraḍu vokkaloḷagāda samasta halaru koṭṭa dāna śāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdarā pūrvvadali raṁgaṁṇaseṭṭi raṁgaṁṇana keṟiya samīpadalu māḍida dharmādali
cauḷikēriya bāḷuvi naranabāḷu nākuvokkala mēle A vināyakadēvarige Eraḍu
hottige kaṁcina voppāne Akki naivēdya gaṁdha dhūpa pūjārige māleya kaṭṭuvarige dēva dī
dēvara cautiya hōma nālvatta Eṁṭu maṁdi brāhmaṇa bhōjana brahmaru nāgarige hālu he
dakeya balipūje Ariya kēriya halarige Eṁṭu vīḷeya cauḍēśvarige Eḷudinada katheya
biya mugiva dina puje katheya hēḷidavarige Uḍugoṟi prati Amāvāseyalu yibbaru brā
hmaṇabhōjana kāṇike dī ḷigeya habbake kāyi Adalu Asādiya habbake tupakā
yi bedeyakaṭṭu mūṟu yi ṣṭanaḍasi Anākokkalu raṁgaṁṇaseṭṭige varuṣaṁprati teṟu
va bhatta nāḍahāḷaṁ lekkada mu 30 nārāyaṇa dēvarige bhatta mu 8 ḷa Ā nāraṇadēvaranaru raṁ
gaṁṇaseṭṭige Uḍugoṟiyūgi kāga vaha be ḍa 1 mattaṁ cauḷiyabeṭṭu maḍivaḷa be
ṭṭu bestavara beṭṭu Uppu pātreya bāḷu yi bāḷiṁda naḍavadharma mūṟu varuṣake vo
ṁdubāri keṟiya kesara tegadū A keṟiya jīrnnōddhāra kasava tegedavarige maḍivaḷarige
Uppu pātre kuḍinīru Ariya kēriya halarige jātaṇa yiṣṭu naḍaūdu ma
Ūka sīme saha mattaṁ hāṁge karada voḷage Amāvāseya dharmakke biṭa
bāḷiṁda prati Amāvāseyalu haṁneraḍu maṁdi brāhmaṇa bhōjana varuṣaṁprati vo
ppāne tuppa ṇakke mattevanēnu naḍavaṁthādanu Aṣṭabhōgavanu Ariyagēriya halara
keyyalu muṁna raṁgaṁṇaseṭṭe koṭṭarāgi Ā Ariya halaru dāna dhārāpūrvvakavāgi kaṁnē
śavoḍeyarige dhāreya neṟadukoṭṭa dānaśāsana yiṁdiṁda hiṁdake kaṁnēśavoḍeya
rige koṭṭaṁthā dharmmada pāripatyauṁ muṁde Aru Alli māḍida dharmada pāripatya A
ryyakēriya halarigeṁdu voḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭadāna śāsana yiṁtappudakke halara voppa
rara suhastada voppaBelow this is engraved the following matter in Nāgarī characters. It is damaged and appears to be in late characters.
|| svasti śrī gaṇesāya namaḥ śrīmudheśāya namaḥ śrī cāgesāya namaḥ śrī guru-
bhyoṁ namaḥ
brāhmaṇa muru veda muṣa pāṭha
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
